module RefModule (
    input [7:0] in0,
    input [7:0] in1,
    input sel,
    output reg [7:0] out
);always_comb begin
        case (sel)
            1'b0: out = in0;
            1'b1: out = in1;
            default: out = 8'b00000000;
        endcase
    end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
    end
  end

endmodule
